title: coaching — retention windows
description: Retention aligned with US DOL wage-and-hour + NCAA / IHSA coach-verification compliance. Active coaching records retain for the lifetime of the parent Staff. Deactivated profiles retain 7 years (10 with coaching_extended_retention). Certifications retain while-active + 7 years post-expiration. Skill ratings retain 2 years default (5 with extended). Tenant erasure cascades except records under active regulator hold.
compliance_regimes_referenced: gdpr Art. 17 §3(b) — erasure exception for legal obligation

cold.days: 2555 (7 years post deactivation); 3650 (10 years with coaching_extended_retention)

purge.action: hard delete via PurgeCoachingDataForErasedTenant + companion job (Wave 4+)
purge.notes: Employment-record retention per US DOL. Cascades to child certifications + assignments + ratings.
Wage-and-hour audit retention. Historical roster survives archive/withdrawal of parent Team/Event/Session.

hot.days: co-terminous with expires_at (or forever if no expiry)

purge.notes: NCAA / IHSA / SafeSport compliance — verification history must survive coach's employment for regulatory investigations.

hot.days: co-terminous with expires_at (default 2 years post rated_at)

purge.notes: Ratings are evaluation-authored; retention shorter than employment records but still audit-visible for the medium term.

cross_reference: TenantErased cascades hard-delete of every coaching row via FK CASCADE. Audit rows survive per the audit module's outlives-source design.
Regulator hold: When a tenant carries an active regulator hold flag (Wave 4+ tenancy audit trail), the purge job skips those rows regardless of retention window.
Extended retention grandfathered per-record: a profile deactivated while the tenant carried coaching_extended_retention retains 10y even if the tenant later downgrades to Medium.
